title: go-perf-agent scope
description: In/out-of-scope code paths written to .go-perf-agent/scope.json by `scope` and `target-diff`. Read by `hotspots` (candidate tagging) and the structural gate (which rejects out-of-scope edits). Shape mirrors internal/hotspot.Scope.

include.description: path prefixes in scope (empty = whole module in scope). A trailing /... is ignored.

exclude.description: path prefixes out of scope. Exclude wins over include.
